scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/server" "wait-on .server-port && concurrently \"npm run dev -w packages/agent\" \"npm run dev -w packages/web\""
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/agent && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate -w packages/server && npm run db:push -w packages/server
scripts.evals: npm run build && npm run test -w packages/evals
